properties.name: outbox.table-prefix
properties.description: Optional prefix for outbox database tables. If specified, all outbox tables (outbox_record, outbox_instance, outbox_partition) will be prefixed with this value. Example: 'myapp_' results in tables 'myapp_outbox_record', 'myapp_outbox_instance', 'myapp_outbox_partition'.

properties.name: outbox.schema-initialization.enabled
properties.description: Whether schema initialization is enabled at startup
